svg.title: Debug platform modular design diagram
svg.desc: Four-layer modular breakdown: Frontend React layer, Backend Node.js services, Web3 Solidity logic, and Persistence storage.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the authentication module work in Debug?')

sendPrompt('What Express API endpoints does Debug expose?')

sendPrompt('How does the Bounty Escrow smart contract work?')
sendPrompt('What does the ABI interface handler do in Debug?')
sendPrompt('What data does Supabase store for Debug?')
sendPrompt('What is stored on the blockchain in Debug?')
